steps.title: Identify the direction of the line of best fit
steps.content: The line of best fit runs from the upper left of the plot (low elevation around 6000 ft, high temperature around 44°F) down to the lower right (high elevation around 9000 ft, low temperature around 38°F). This shows the line has a negative slope.

steps.title: Interpret the association
steps.content: A negative slope means that as elevation increases (moving right on the x-axis), the temperature decreases (moving down on the y-axis). Therefore, as the elevation increases, the temperature tends to decrease. That matches choice B — B is correct.
